response.justification: Bogdan brings 20+ years of strong software engineering experience with demonstrated entrepreneurial ability through GISCollective, and his recent focus on AI infrastructure at re:cinq shows emerging engagement with AI technologies. However, the Principal Engineer role explicitly requires recognized expertise in AI with demonstrated products or platforms built with AI, and strategic advisory experience—neither of which are clearly evident in his resume. His technical foundation is solid, but he appears to be in an early phase of AI specialization rather than having the established track record the role seeks.
strengths: 20+ years of software engineering experience substantially exceeding the 15-year minimum requirement
Founder of GISCollective demonstrates entrepreneurial initiative and ability to build and sustain production platforms
Currently working on AI-agent infrastructure and MCP frameworks, showing active engagement with emerging AI technologies
concerns: No demonstrated products or platforms built with AI as core differentiator
AI infrastructure work is very recent (2 months at re:cinq) and toolkit-focused rather than strategic product-level
Resume lacks evidence of strategic advisory experience with customers or leadership in identifying platform/product strategy at scale
